title: Optimize UTF-16LE to UTF-8 transcoding throughput [uneven medium mixed]
goal: Transcode a valid UTF-16LE string to UTF-8 and return a checksum over the exact UTF-8 byte sequence.
metric: median elapsed_ns over repeated runs; lower is better
correctness_rule: Returned checksum must exactly match the expected checksum over the UTF-8 output bytes.
